entities.name: PHENOLOGICAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The timing of biological events in a plant's life cycle, critical for crop adaptation to climate shifts

entities.name: CROP ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process of adjusting crop characteristics or management to survive and thrive in changing environments

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns that alter rainfall and phenology

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount and distribution of precipitation during the growing season

entities.name: WATER DEMAND
entities.description: The amount of water required by crops for growth and development

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water accessible to crops, primarily from rainfall

entities.name: ASIA-PACIFIC
entities.description: The geographic region where farmers and policy agencies are adapting to climate change

entities.name: TIMING OF PLANTING
entities.description: A strategy involving the adjustment of sowing dates to match climate shifts

entities.name: RAINWATER RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing rainwater to ensure crop water needs are met

entities.name: NEW VARIETIES
entities.description: The use of improved crop cultivars to enhance resilience and productivity

entities.name: DISEASE MANAGEMENT PROTOCOLS
entities.description: Standardized procedures to manage and mitigate crop diseases

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC DISTRIBUTION OF CROPS
entities.description: The spatial arrangement and shifting of where specific crops are grown

entities.name: METEOROLOGICAL PARAMETERS
entities.description: Measurable atmospheric variables used to analyze climate changes

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, and nutritious food
